div.span:
Variable Length Subnet Mask:
Same network with different masks:
192.168.1.0/26 (62 hosts) - Main Office
192.168.1.64/27 (30 hosts) - Branch 1
192.168.1.96/28 (14 hosts) - Branch 2
192.168.1.112/30 (2 hosts) - P2P Link

How many hosts
per subnet needed?

Calculate Host Bits:
2^n - 2 ≥ hosts
(n = host bits)

Calculate Subnet Bits:
2^s ≥ subnets
(s = subnet bits)

Total bits = 32?
Network + Subnet
+ Host bits

Invalid: Adjust
requirements or
choose larger network

Determine New Prefix:
Original prefix + subnet bits
e.g., /24 + 4 bits = /28

Calculate Magic Number:
256 - last octet = increment
256 - 240 = 16

Summary:
Total Subnets: 16 (2^4)
Hosts per Subnet: 14 (2^4 - 2)
Total Usable Hosts: 224
